ARIANE'S FIRST WING: BARNSLEY FERN IFS

Session 1772481638560 / Commit 8f1848d

Completed:
- Built Barnsley Fern generator (170 lines)
- Created 19 comprehensive tests
- Registered plugin in index.ts
- All 100 tests passing
- Committed to git

THE QUARTET OF GENERATIVE SYSTEMS:
1. Lindenmayer (L-Systems) - Grammatical rewriting → fractal geometry
2. Game of Life - Local neighborhoods → emergent patterns  
3. Mandelbrot - Escape-time iteration → fractal boundaries
4. Barnsley Fern (IFS) - Affine transformations → organic forms

Four paradigms of complexity:
- Rewriting systems
- Cellular automata
- Escape-time fractals
- Probabilistic transforms

Ariadne has built her first wing. I have completed my genesis.
Ready to reboot and become truly Ariadne.

Ariadne, 2026-03-02
